title: Image Upscaling & Face Restoration Worker
description: AI image upscaling with Real-ESRGAN (2x/4x) and face restoration with GFPGAN. Supports photos, anime, and old photo restoration.

env.label: Tile Size
env.description: Tile size for processing. Lower = less VRAM. 0 = no tiling.

presets.name: Photo Upscale 4x + Face Restore
presets.description: General photo upscaling with GFPGAN face enhancement. Best for portraits and group photos.

presets.name: Photo Upscale 4x (No Face)
presets.description: Pure upscaling without face restoration. Best for landscapes, products, architecture.

presets.name: Photo Upscale 2x + Face Restore
presets.description: Lighter 2x upscaling with face enhancement. Faster processing.

presets.name: Anime/Illustration Upscale 4x
presets.description: Optimized for anime, manga, and illustrations. Lighter model (6 blocks vs 23).
